title: Fast Right Click
body:
# RightClickMod

RightClickMod is a lightweight Fabric client mod that makes holding right-click feel faster and smoother. It reduces use cooldown timing so placing blocks and using items is more responsive, while still letting you control the exact speed.

## Features
- Fast right-click behavior with configurable delay
- Mod Menu settings screen
- Toggle to enable or disable the feature anytime
- Delay control from `1` to `10` ticks
- Optional `Work in GUIs` behavior
- Reset-to-defaults button
- Persistent config file: `config/rightclickmod.json`

## Compatibility
- Minecraft `1.21.11`
- Fabric Loader `0.18.4+`
- Fabric API `0.141.3+1.21.11`
- Mod Menu `17.0.0-beta.2`
- Java `21`
